docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, BELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACOSTA, THELMA $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.00, $4800 PAYABLE IN INSTALLMENTS OF $300/MONTH PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $300.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEB-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, THELMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,200.00 FILED BY ACOSTA, BELLA AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, THELMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED DEC-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, THELMA
COPYING FEES (16 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, BELLA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF BELLA ACOSTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THELMA ACOSTA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
